audit.alias_note: STAY=NOOP/FIRE, UP=RIGHT/RIGHTFIRE, DOWN=LEFT/LEFTFIRE; Pong has NO UPFIRE/DOWNFIRE.
audit.policy_support_note: T=2.0 behavior policy gives non-degenerate support to all 3 groups in decision states (min group prop reported above) -> heuristic same-state negatives are available; majority-group prop sets the imitation floor.
audit.normalization: 6-dim mean/std on observational TRAIN episodes only; reused for val+emulator
audit.episode_split: 3-way episode-level (disjoint); cloned eval states from independent rollout seed 8000
audit.emulator_eval: Stage-1H branch cache (clone/restore, canonical 0/2/3); col k -> group k (aligned)
